scripts.slides:dev: npm run slides:assets && marp --config presentation/marp/marp.config.mjs --server --watch presentation/marp/slides
scripts.slides:images: rm -rf presentation/marp/outputs/images && mkdir -p presentation/marp/outputs/images && marp --config presentation/marp/marp.config.mjs presentation/marp/slides/numerical-methods.md --images png -o presentation/marp/outputs/images/slide.png
scripts.slides:build: npm run slides:assets && npm run slides:html && npm run slides:pdf && npm run slides:pptx && npm run slides:images
scripts.pages:build: npm run build && npm run pre:build && node presentation/web-pre/scripts/build-pages.mjs
